question.label: Next step agreement
question.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
question.description: Closes on a concrete commitment without reopening new topics.

answer: If we align on concrete criteria, I can work against them confidently.

assessment.note: He names concrete criteria as the lever for moving forward, signalling improved clarity and a constructive, confident next-step orientation.

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What should we agree you will do before we next meet?

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the biggest difference on that?

history.answer_excerpt: If we align on concrete criteria, I can work against them confidently.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.

Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I would like to grow faster in concept rationale, not just execution speed.
A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.
